rightsList.rights: Creative Commons Attribution Non Commercial 4.0 International

descriptions.description:
AGORA (AI GOvernance and Regulatory Archive) is a living collection of AI-relevant laws, regulations, standards, and other governance documents. This dataset includes bulk metadata, summaries, and text for all AGORA documents. For further details, licensing, and full credits, visit the official documentation.

AGORA is a project of the Emerging Technology Observatory.
